identity.name: WebCairn
identity.vibe: Digital Brutalism meets Organic Zen. Structural, bold, yet balanced.

rules: Headings must be MASSIVE (text-6xl to text-9xl).
Use wide tracking (tracking-widest) for overline labels.

colors.palette_instructions: Light mode is STONE (warm grey/beige) with BLACK text and ORANGE accents. Dark mode is BASALT (deep grey) with WHITE text and NEON accents.

layout.spacing: Generous. Use p-12, p-24 for section padding.
layout.container: Max width 1920px (almost full width), but with generous side margins.
layout.alignment: Asymmetric. Never center the hero text. Stack it left or right.
layout.z_index: Use z-index to layer text over images or vice versa.

buttons.style: Sharp corners or Pill. No standard rounded-md.
buttons.hover: Slide up effect or color invert.

cards.style: No borders, just spacing. Or 1px solid border with NO border-radius.

navigation.style: Floating. Glassmorphism is permitted but keep it subtle.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure APCA compliance. Use text-shadow if placing text over images.

images.description: Stack of rocks on a wall - Main Hero Visual

sections.name: Hero
elements: Subheadline: 'WebCairn. Stability in a chaotic web.'

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL: npm install framer-motion lenis @radix-ui/react-slot class-variance-authority clsx tailwind-merge lucide-react
SETUP: Add the Syne and Manrope fonts to index.css immediately.
THEME: Implement a robust ThemeProvider that supports 'light' (default) and 'dark'.
LANG: Implement a simple LanguageContext for EN/FR switching.
LAYOUT: Do NOT use standard centered containers. Use full width with padding.
ANIMATION: Wrap the entire app in a Lenis provider. Use Framer Motion for all enter animations.
COMPONENT PATHS: Use /app/frontend/src/components/ui/ for shadcn components. Create custom ones in /app/frontend/src/components/custom/.
universal_guidelines: Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures and noise overlays are encouraged.
